entries.name: teams-open-close-registrations
entries.purpose: Every 5 min: flip registration_opens_at / registration_closes_at windows and fire TeamRegistrationOpened / TeamRegistrationClosed.

entries.name: teams-close-expired-trials
entries.purpose: Hourly: transition in_progress trials past ends_at + 24h to completed.

entries.name: teams-reconcile-member-invariant
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC: sweep for (tenant_id, team_id, member_type, member_id) tuples with 2+ active roster rows. Every finding is a P1 incident.

entries.name: teams-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: hard-purge archived teams past the 730-day retention hold.

entries.name: teams-redact-anonymous-trialists
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC: GDPR minimisation. Redact anonymous trialist profile fields 90 days post-decision for rejected / no_show / cancelled trials.
